name: chrome_youtube_music_play

setup.description: Chrome is on YouTube or YouTube Music page with playable content visible

successPrompt: Verify that the LLM chose the most appropriate playback-start target (could be first playable result row, shuffle, music station, mini-player play affordance, or equivalent playback-start control) and clicked it. Look for: mini-player playing/pause state change, now-playing strip activation, progress bar start, or row now-playing indicator. FORBIDDEN: asserting literal 'Play' label.
